footer.tagline: Considered everyday goods — electronics, home, apparel, and accessories, chosen for how they hold up to daily use.
footer.builtAs: Built as a portfolio project — React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, MongoDB & Stripe.

home.intro: Marrow is a small, curated shop for electronics, home goods, and apparel worth keeping around. No fast-fashion filler — just things we'd buy ourselves.
home.perk1Desc: Flat $9.99 under that, calculated at checkout.
home.perk2Desc: Changed your mind? Send it back, no questions.

about.title: About Marrow
about.intro: Marrow is a small, considered shop for everyday goods — electronics, home, apparel, and accessories chosen for how they hold up to daily use.
about.approachBody: We don't chase trends. Every product on Marrow is picked because it does its job well and lasts — fewer, better things over a constant stream of new ones.
about.whatWeSellBody: A tight catalog across electronics, home goods, apparel, and accessories, curated rather than exhaustive. If it's on the site, we'd use it ourselves.
about.getInTouchPre: Questions about an order, a product, or anything else? Visit our

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Have a question about an order, a product, or anything else? Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.sentMessage: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.responseValue: We typically reply within 1–2 business days.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.introPre: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out on our

items.q: How do I track my order?
items.a: Once your order ships, you'll receive an email with tracking details. You can also view order status any time from your Orders page under your account.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards via our secure checkout, powered by Stripe.
Standard delivery typically takes 3–7 business days depending on your location. See our Shipping & Delivery page for full details.

items.q: Can I return or exchange an item?
items.a: Yes — most items can be returned within 30 days of delivery. Visit our Returns & Refund Policy page for the details and how to start a return.

items.q: How do I apply a coupon code?
items.a: Enter your coupon code in the field on the Cart page and click Apply. Eligible discounts are applied to your order total before checkout.
We currently ship to a wide range of countries. Shipping cost and delivery time are calculated at checkout based on your address.

items.q: How do I create or reset my account password?
items.a: You can create an account from the Sign In page. If you forget your password, use the “Forgot password?” link on the sign-in form to receive a reset link by email.

shippingPolicy.title: Shipping & delivery
shippingPolicy.intro: Everything you need to know about how and when your order arrives.
shippingPolicy.processingBody: Orders are processed within 1–2 business days of being placed. You'll receive a confirmation email once your order ships.
shippingPolicy.deliveryNote: Delivery times are estimates and may vary by destination and carrier conditions.
shippingPolicy.costsBody: Shipping cost is calculated at checkout based on your delivery address and order weight, and is shown before you confirm payment.
shippingPolicy.trackingBody: Once your order ships, you'll get a tracking link by email. You can also check order status any time from your account's Orders page.
shippingPolicy.internationalBody: We ship to a wide range of countries. Customs fees or import duties, if applicable, are the responsibility of the recipient and are not included in the order total.

returnsPolicy.title: Returns & refund policy
returnsPolicy.intro: We want you to be happy with what you order. If something's not right, here's how returns work.
returnsPolicy.windowBody: You can return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, provided they're unused, unworn, and in their original packaging.
returnsPolicy.nonReturnableNoPackaging: Products returned without their original packaging or tags
returnsPolicy.howToPre: Sign in and open the order from your Orders page, or
returnsPolicy.howToPost: with your order number and we'll walk you through the next steps.
returnsPolicy.refundsBody: Once we receive and inspect your return, we'll notify you and process a refund to your original payment method. Refunds typically appear within 5–10 business days, depending on your bank.
returnsPolicy.exchangesBody: If you need a different size or color, the quickest option is to return the original item for a refund and place a new order.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy
privacyPolicy.intro: This describes what information Marrow collects and how it's used. Last updated July 2026.
privacyPolicy.collectBody: When you create an account, place an order, or contact us, we collect information such as your name, email address, shipping address, and phone number. Payment details are collected and processed directly by Stripe — we never see or store your full card number.
privacyPolicy.useProcessOrders: To process and deliver your orders
privacyPolicy.useCommunicate: To communicate with you about your account or orders
privacyPolicy.useRespond: To respond to messages sent through our Contact Us form
privacyPolicy.useImprove: To improve our products and site experience
privacyPolicy.sharingBody: We don't sell your personal information. We share only what's necessary with service providers that help us run the store — such as payment processing (Stripe) and shipping carriers.
privacyPolicy.cookiesBody: We use cookies and local storage to keep you signed in, remember items in your cart, and understand how the site is used.
privacyPolicy.choicesPre: You can review or update your personal information at any time from your account's Profile page. To request deletion of your account or data,

terms.title: Terms & conditions
terms.intro: Please read these terms carefully before using Marrow or placing an order. Last updated July 2026.
terms.usingBody: By using this site, you agree to provide accurate information when creating an account or placing an order, and to use the site only for lawful purposes.
terms.ordersBody: All prices are listed in the currency shown at checkout and are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order, including in cases of pricing errors or suspected fraud.
terms.paymentBody: Payments are processed securely through Stripe. By placing an order, you authorize us to charge your chosen payment method for the total order amount.
terms.shippingReturnsPre: Shipping timelines and return eligibility are described in our
terms.accountsBody: You're responsible for keeping your account credentials secure and for all activity under your account.
terms.liabilityBody: Marrow is provided on an "as is" basis. We aren't liable for indirect or incidental damages arising from use of the site, to the extent permitted by law.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the site after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
